category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the South Korea market.

title.en: China-to-South Korea LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against South Korea KC certification (Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act), KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 safety, KC-EMC (RRA), energy efficiency grade labelling (에너지소비효율등급) via KEMCO/KEA, and IEC 62471 photobiological safety requirements versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与韩国 KC 认证（《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》）、KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 安全、KC-EMC（RRA）、经 KEMCO/KEA 的能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급）及 IEC 62471 光生物安全要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與韓國 KC 認證（《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》）、KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 安全、KC-EMC（RRA）、經 KEMCO/KEA 的能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급）及 IEC 62471 光生物安全要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South Korea law, KS standards, KATS safety certification requirements, KEA/KEMCO energy efficiency grade thresholds, KC-EMC requirements, and K-REACH chemical obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国法律、KS 标准、KATS 安全认证要求、KEA/KEMCO 能效等级阈值、KC-EMC 要求及 K-REACH 化学品义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國法律、KS 標準、KATS 安全認證要求、KEA/KEMCO 能效等級閾值、KC-EMC 要求及 K-REACH 化學品義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the South Korea market must obtain the KC Mark under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (administered by KATS under MOTIE), with the applicable conformity route — KC Safety Certification, Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation, or Supplier's Declaration of Conformity — depending on the product's risk class; meet electrical safety under KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 (EN 60598-1 equivalent) verified at a KATS-designated lab such as KTC, KTL, or KTR; satisfy KC-EMC requirements administered by the RRA (covering both emissions and immunity for lighting equipment, CISPR 15 / IEC 61547-aligned); register for the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급, 1–5 grades) via KEA/KEMCO where the product is a designated energy-using product; document photobiological safety to IEC 62471; comply with the RoHS-equivalent restrictions under the Act on Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles; and track K-REACH chemical obligations — none of which are covered by existing CCC certification. Note: Korea's grid is 220 V / 60 Hz versus China's 220 V / 50 Hz, so frequency-sensitive components and any energy/EMC test conditions must be re-verified.
answer_first.zh: 进入韩国市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（由产业通商资源部下属 KATS 管理）取得 KC 标志，并按产品风险等级采用相应合格评定路径——KC 安全认证、自律安全确认或供应商符合性声明；依据 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598（相当于 EN 60598-1）满足电气安全要求，并由 KATS 指定实验室（如 KTC、KTL、KTR）验证；满足由 RRA 管理的 KC-EMC 要求（涵盖照明设备的发射和抗扰度，与 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 对齐）；对属于指定能源效率产品的情形，经 KEA/KEMCO 注册韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급，1–5 级）；按 IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；遵守《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》下的 RoHS 等效限制；并跟踪 K-REACH 化学品义务——上述均不被现有 CCC 认证所涵盖。注意：韩国电网为 220 V / 60 Hz，而中国为 220 V / 50 Hz，故对频率敏感的元件及任何能效/EMC 测试条件须重新核验。
answer_first.zht: 進入韓國市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（由產業通商資源部下屬 KATS 管理）取得 KC 標誌，並按產品風險等級採用相應合格評定路徑——KC 安全認證、自律安全確認或供應商符合性聲明；依據 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598（相當於 EN 60598-1）滿足電氣安全要求，並由 KATS 指定實驗室（如 KTC、KTL、KTR）驗證；滿足由 RRA 管理的 KC-EMC 要求（涵蓋照明設備的發射和抗擾度，與 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 對齊）；對屬於指定能源效率產品的情形，經 KEA/KEMCO 注冊韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급，1–5 級）；按 IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；遵守《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》下的 RoHS 等效限制；並跟蹤 K-REACH 化學品義務——上述均不被現有 CCC 認證所涵蓋。注意：韓國電網為 220 V / 60 Hz，而中國為 220 V / 50 Hz，故對頻率敏感的元件及任何能效/EMC 測試條件須重新核驗。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official South Korea regulator (KATS, MOTIE, RRA, KEA/KEMCO), KS standards body, KC certification rule, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. KC safety certification scope, KEA/KEMCO energy efficiency grade thresholds, and the RoHS-equivalent restricted substance list under the Act on Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles must be re-verified against current KS standards and KATS/MOE notices on each review cycle.

q.en: Which South Korea regulation and energy label apply to LED luminaires and lamps?
q.zh: 哪项韩国法规和能效标签适用于LED灯具和灯泡？
q.zht: 哪項韓國法規和能效標籤適用於LED燈具和燈泡？

a.en: LED luminaires are regulated for safety under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (KC Mark, administered by KATS under MOTIE), with safety assessed to KS C 7653 / IEC 60598. Designated energy-using LED products must also carry the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급, grades 1–5) and be registered with the Korea Energy Agency (KEA) / KEMCO before market placement. KC-EMC requirements are administered by the RRA.
a.zh: LED灯具的安全受《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》监管（KC标志，由产业通商资源部下属KATS管理），安全依据KS C 7653 / IEC 60598评定。属于指定能源使用产品的LED产品还须贴附韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급，1–5级），并在上市前向韩国能源公团（KEA）/KEMCO注册。KC-EMC要求由RRA管理。
a.zht: LED燈具的安全受《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》監管（KC標誌，由產業通商資源部下屬KATS管理），安全依據KS C 7653 / IEC 60598評定。屬於指定能源使用產品的LED產品還須貼附韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급，1–5級），並在上市前向韓國能源公團（KEA）/KEMCO注冊。KC-EMC要求由RRA管理。

q.en: Does the KC Mark cover all compliance requirements for LED luminaires in South Korea?
q.zh: KC标志是否涵盖LED灯具在韩国的所有合规要求？
q.zht: KC標誌是否涵蓋LED燈具在韓國的所有合規要求？

a.en: No. The KC Mark under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act covers electrical safety and (via KC-EMC, administered by the RRA) electromagnetic compatibility — but the energy efficiency grade label registration with KEA/KEMCO, photobiological safety assessment to IEC 62471, and the RoHS-equivalent restrictions under the Act on Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles are separate obligations. Importers must also meet K-REACH chemical obligations.
a.zh: 不。《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》下的KC标志涵盖电气安全及（经由RRA管理的KC-EMC）电磁兼容性，但向KEA/KEMCO注册的能效等级标签、依据IEC 62471的光生物安全评估，以及《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》下的RoHS等效限制属于独立义务。进口商还须满足K-REACH化学品义务。
a.zht: 不。《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》下的KC標誌涵蓋電氣安全及（經由RRA管理的KC-EMC）電磁兼容性，但向KEA/KEMCO注冊的能效等級標籤、依據IEC 62471的光生物安全評估，以及《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》下的RoHS等效限制屬於獨立義務。進口商還須滿足K-REACH化學品義務。
